title: Capturing specific data for mass communications
excerpt:
I’m using monday.com to help track activities performed by our sales staff.

posts.author: PMottshaw (Paula)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using monday.com to help track activities performed by our sales staff.

Example: Sales staff sends out a mass email to 150 different organizations. I want staff to be able to enter this activity on a single line of a data table but also capture the types of organizations they are emailing. How can I accomplish this without entering each organization individually?
